description: Full-coverage Conduyt CLI: every endpoint, plus Kloudi-grade send-safety forensics no other surface has.

novel_features.name: Send-safety check
novel_features.description: Go/no-go verdict on a list, tag, or contact before any SMS or drip: phone present, Twilio-verified line type, Twilio validity, and DNC status in one table (see imports blame for provider rejections).

novel_features.name: Import delivery blame
novel_features.description: For one import job: who got the SMS, who was skipped, and why — grouped by rejection or skip reason.

novel_features.name: Import watcher
novel_features.description: Polls an import job to completion, then renders the row-outcome recap (created/updated/skipped/errors) and, with --verify, the SMS delivery report.

novel_features.name: Verification cost estimate
novel_features.description: Counts unverified contacts and prints the tenant-paid Twilio cost before the loop (--estimate), then drives the batched verification to done. Requires the account's Phone Line-Type Verification setting (403 'not enabled' otherwise).

novel_features.name: Drip ledger audit
novel_features.description: Flags duplicate sends in a window: any contact who received the same message body more than once, from the local store.

novel_features.name: Local analytics
novel_features.description: GROUP BY over synced entities — segment counts without paging the API (--type/--group-by/--limit).

novel_features.name: Live event follow
novel_features.description: Interval polling over a resource that re-emits current results as JSON — watch messages or activities as a blast goes out.
